sections.sectionTitle: Job in Migilote' Mawk Daupaina Gen

verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“Ka thugente limtakin hong ngai un la, ka thu nong ngaihna uh nong hehnepna uh hisak ni
Thu ka gen theihna ding hun hong pia un la, ka gen khit ciangin na ut uh leh hong zahpih un
“Kei' kitotpih pen mihing hilo hi. Bang hangin lungtomlo ding ka hi hiam
Kei hong en dih un. Lamdangsak taak hilo ka hi hiam
Keima tunga thupiang ka ngaihsut ciangin lamdangsa mahmahin lau-in ka ling hi
“Bang hangin Pasian in migilote khan'tosak a, hausakin liansak ahi hiam
A tate uh nuamtakin a khan'tohna, a u a nau, a suan a khakte uh a pun'na a mu ding dongin a nungta uh hi
Pasian in amaute' innsungah lungkhamna tungsaklo a, amaute in lauhuaina thuakkha ngeilo uh hi
A bawngte uh pung a, tatolh cih om ngeilo hi
Tuuno bangin a naupangte uh taikhia-in kimawl uh a
tamngai leh harp lasakna aw tawh a kituakin a lam uh hi
Amaute a nuntak sungin cithei mahmah uh a, gentheihna tuak seloin nuamtakin a si hiat uh hi
“Migilote in Pasian nawlkhin uh a, Pasian in amau' nuntak ding a deihsakte thei nuamlo uh hi
Pasian' na sep ding kisam sa selo uh a, Pasian kianga thunget phattuamna om kei, ci uh hi
Amau' thahatna hang bek tawh a gina kisa uh a, amau' ngaihsutna leh kei' ngaihsutna kigamla hi
“Migilopa' meivak kisukmitsak ngei ahi hiam? Amaute khat beek in lungkhamna tuak ngei ahi uh hiam? Pasian in hehna tawh migilote gim pia ngei ahi hiam
Huih in a letkhiat buhkungte, leh huihpi in a mutkhiat buhsi bangin amaute bawl ngei ahi hiam
“Pasian in a pa' khialhna hangin a ta gim pia hi, na ci uh hi. Tua bang hilo! Pasian in a mawhte teek mah gim pia hen la, amau' mawhna hangin gim pia ahihna theisak hen
Mawhneite amau' mawhna hangin gimna thuaksak hen la, Vanglianpa' hehna theisak ta hen
Mi khat a nuntakna a bei khit ciangin, a naupangte' nopsakna phawk thei nawn ahi hiam
Mi khat in Pasian' tungah thu hilh thei ding ahi hiam? Vanglianpa tungah thu khen thei ding ahi hiam
“Mi pawlkhatte a cithei mahmahin si a, lungmuang tak leh lungnuam takin om uh a
annek tuidawn a kicingin a nei uh hi
Mi pawlkhatte ahih leh nopsak cih theikha ngeiloin lunggimin a si uh hi
Ahi zongin a kibangin a vekpi-in si-in kivui a, than in amaute tuamcip hi
“Na lungsim sung uhah na ngaihsutna uh, kei nong siatsak nopnate uh ka tel mahmah hi
Siatna a gamta, mi lianpa' inn, koi-ah omta ahi hiam, na ci uh hi
“Khualzinzin mite tawh kiho ngeilo na hi uh hiam? Amaute' thugente, theilo na hi uh hiam
Pasian hehin, mite gim a piak ciangin migilote peng tawntung zawsop hi
Migilopa a gamtatna bangin a thukkik ding, migilopa mawhsakin a langpang ding kuamah omlo hi
Migilopa a kivui ciangin a hankhuk kicing a
mi tul tampi in amah kha-in hoihtakin lei tawh kivuk hi
“Tu-in note in a mawknapi tawh hehnep nong sawm uh hi. Na gen uh thu khempeuh zuauthu vive hi lel hi,” a ci hi.
